title: Create sub-automations

posts.author: SoNo (Swann Dehiles)
posts.cookedHtml:
It would be really nice if we could create automations that work on the line.

A sub-automation is only activated if the previous one is activated.

Sub-automations would not necessarily always need their cause/consequence systems.

It would look like some sort of tree structure.

This would provide visibility on the automation page, which is currently lacking a little on large tables, but also allow the creation of a huge amount of new possibilities.

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml: You mean something like this? Our new workflow builder is coming and we are looking for 'Alpha' users!

posts.author: SoNo (Swann Dehiles)
posts.cookedHtml:
It looks amazing !

Thank you for the reply =)
